word: H6912 - קָבַר - qâbar - kaw-bar' - [idiom] in any wise

sections.paragraph:
Original: קבר

Transliteration: qâbar

Phonetic: kaw-bar'

BDB Definition:

  1. to bury
    1. (Qal) to bury
    2. (Niphal) to be buried
    3. (Piel) to bury, bury (in masses)
    4. (Pual) to be buried

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 1984

Part(s) of speech: Verb
